army_rules.name: Oath of Moment
army_rules.description: This ability is described in full on the Army Rules page of Codex: Space Marines .

army_rules.name: The Sons of Sanguinius
army_rules.description: If an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit has a second Faction keyword on its datasheet, that Faction keyword is the name of that unit’s Chapter. For example, Lemartes has both the ADEPTUS ASTARTES and BLOOD ANGELS Faction keywords, and is therefore from the Blood Angels Chapter. You cannot include units from more than one Chapter in your army. Designer’s Note : The rules presented in this section assume that the ADEPTUS ASTARTES units in your army are from the Blood Angels Chapter, but they can also be used to represent any Blood Angels successor Chapter, such as one described in the background section of this book, or even one of your own invention. However, players who wish to faithfully recreate the Blood Angels Chapter on the tabletop should only include BLOOD ANGELS EPIC HEROES if their collection is intended to represent the First Founding Chapter itself; Mephiston is the Chief Librarian of the Blood Angels, for example, and not of any of their successors.

army_rules.name: Oath of Moment
army_rules.description: If your Army Faction is ADEPTUS ASTARTES , at the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Oath of Moment target. Each time a model with this ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target: You can re-roll the Hit roll. If you are using a Codex: Space Marines Detachment and your army does not include one or more units with the BLACK TEMPLARS , BLOOD ANGELS , DARK ANGELS , DEATHWATCH or SPACE WOLVES keywords, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

army_rules.name: Space Marine Chapters
army_rules.description: If an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit has a second Faction keyword on its datasheet, that Faction keyword is the name of that unit’s Chapter. For example, Marneus Calgar has both the ADEPTUS ASTARTES and ULTRAMARINES Faction keywords, and is therefore from the Ultramarines Chapter. You cannot include units from more than one Chapter in your army. If your army includes one or more BLACK TEMPLARS units, it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER models, and cannot include any of the following models that do not have the Black Templars keyword: GLADIATOR LANCER ; GLADIATOR REAPER ; GLADIATOR VALIANT ; IMPULSOR ; REPULSOR ; REPULSOR EXECUTIONER . If your army includes one or more SPACE WOLVES units, it cannot include any of the following units: APOTHECARY ; DEVASTATOR SQUAD ; TACTICAL SQUAD . DEATHWATCH Your army can include ADEPTUS ASTARTES DEATHWATCH units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter. With the exception of KILL TEAM CASSIUS (see Legends: Agents of the Imperium ), your army cannot include any AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM DEATHWATCH units. Your army cannot include any of the following units: ASSAULT SQUAD ; ASSAULT SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS ; ATTACK BIKE SQUAD ; DEVASTATOR SQUAD ; LAND SPEEDER STORM ; RELIC TERMINATOR SQUAD ; SCOUT BIKE SQUAD ; SCOUT SQUAD ; SCOUT SNIPER SQUAD ; TACTICAL SQUAD ; TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD ; TERMINATOR SQUAD .

detachment_rule.name: Extremis-level Threat
detachment_rule.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

enhancements.name: Fear Made Manifest (Aura)
enhancements.description: While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) is within 6" of the bearer, each time that unit fails a Battle-shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Once per battle, when such an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test, you can choose for D3 models in that unit to be destroyed in this way instead.

enhancements.name: Iron Resolve
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Once per battle, after the bearer’s unit is selected as the target of one or more attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Rites of War
enhancements.description: Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

enhancements.name: The Imperium’s Sword
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Heroes of the Chapter
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR , BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD , STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Terrifying Proficiency
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR , BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD , STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
stratagems.effect: In your opponent’s next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Duty and Honour
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR , BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD , STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Orbital Teleportarium
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Legendary Fortitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR , BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD , STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

detachment_rule.name: RESTRICTIONS
detachment_rule.description: Your army can include BLOOD ANGELS units, but it cannot include ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

enhancements.name: Blazing Icon
enhancements.description: Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Ordained Sacrifice
enhancements.description: The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Prescient Flash
enhancements.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Troubling Visions
enhancements.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. When it does, until the start of your next Command phase, all Angelic Legacy abilities (see Legacy of the Angel Detachment Rule) are active for the bearer’s unit, instead of only two of them.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Focused Fury
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unit is a CHARACTER unit, until the end of the phase, those weapons have the [LANCE] ability as well.

stratagems.name: Instant of Grace
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one non‑ CHARACTER model in your unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, your model has the CHARACTER keyword.

stratagems.name: Strike Now For Glory
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

stratagems.name: In The Shadow Of Great Wings
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Unto The Burning Skies
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, unless it is THE SANGUINOR .
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

detachment_rule.name: Shield of the Imperium
detachment_rule.description: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models from your army have the [HEAVY] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, if the attacking model’s unit Remained Stationary this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Architect of War
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Fleet Commander
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one point on the battlefield and place a marker on that point. At the start of your next Shooting phase, place another marker on the battlefield within 12" of the centre of the first marker, then draw a straight line between the centre of each of these markers. Roll one D6 for each unit that line passes over or through: on a 3+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Both markers are then removed.

enhancements.name: Indomitable Fury
enhancements.description: The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Stoic Defender
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability while they are within range of an objective marker you control and, while that unit is Battle-shocked, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit instead of changing it to 0.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Rigid Discipline
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can immediately make a Fall Back move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Not One Backwards Step
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army within range of an objective marker.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, double the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit, but it must Remain Stationary this turn.

stratagems.name: No Threat Too Great
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Battle Drill Recall
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If your unit Remained Stationary this turn, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Hail of Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

detachment_rule.name: Keywords
detachment_rule.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT units from your army (excluding FLY ) that have a Wounds characteristic of 14+ have the HEAVY TRANSPORT keyword.

enhancements.name: Armoured Commander
enhancements.description: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that TRANSPORT on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Liberator
enhancements.description: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase, and the bearer’s unit (or any HEAVY TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

enhancements.name: Shock Deployment
enhancements.restriction: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR or GRAVIS model only.
enhancements.description: In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Tip of the Spear
enhancements.description: If the bearer starts the battle embarked within a TRANSPORT , that TRANSPORT has the Scouts 6" ability.

stratagems.name: Machine Wrath
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a HEAVY TRANSPORT unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That HEAVY TRANSPORT unit, if you rolled a 6 for its Deadly Demise ability. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise ability is resolved, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Rapid Embarkation
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and one friendly HEAVY TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit is wholly within 6" of that HEAVY TRANSPORT , it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Ceramite Sledgehammer
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features. In addition, if your unit is a HEAVY TRANSPORT , when making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

stratagems.name: Advanced Deployment
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move this phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn (unless your TRANSPORT has the Assault Ramp ability), but can otherwise act normally.

stratagems.name: Purgation Doctrine
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll (if your unit disembarked from a HEAVY TRANSPORT this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll as well).

detachment_rule.name: Interlocking Tactics
detachment_rule.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE units from your army: Are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back. Are eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back. Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army is selected to attack, after resolving those attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit is auspex scanned. Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets an auspex scanned unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Blades of Valour
enhancements.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer and BATTLELINE models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Bombast Omnivox
enhancements.description: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if the bearer’s unit has the BATTLELINE keyword: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Eye of the Primarch
enhancements.description: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer and BATTLELINE models in the bearer’s unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Hero of the Chapter
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, the bearer has the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Codex Discipline
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If that target is auspex scanned, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Guided Disruption
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army has finished making its attacks.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, if that enemy unit does not have the MONSTER or VEHICLE keywords, until the start of your next turn, it is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

stratagems.name: Light of Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have that ability while targeting an auspex scanned unit or if the bearer has the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Shock Bombardment
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army finished making its attacks.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, until the start of your next turn, it is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Angels Defiant
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Heresy Undone
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit (excluding BATTLELINE units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. If it does, every target of that charge and every target of those attacks must be an auspex scanned unit.

detachment_rule.name: Adaptive Defence
detachment_rule.description: Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack, if that model’s unit is within a terrain feature, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army gain the ENTRENCHED keyword while all of the following are true: That unit is within a terrain feature. That unit was not set up on the battlefield this turn. No model in that unit has moved more than 3” this turn.

enhancements.name: Castellum Omnivox
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Fall Back move, select one of the following to apply to that unit until the end of the turn: That unit is eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which it Fell Back. That unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Defensive Mastery
enhancements.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Honour Indefatigable
enhancements.description: The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Spy-skull Data Link
enhancements.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: Unyielding Might
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Priority Strike
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER , MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Stand to the End
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is an ENTRENCHED unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Augmented Targeting
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase
stratagems.effect: Select either the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] abilities. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. If your unit is Entrenched, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities instead.

stratagems.name: Evasive Repositioning
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If your unit is ENTRENCHED , you can re‑roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.

detachment_rule.name: Wrath of Angels
detachment_rule.description: When a friendly Sanguinary Guard unit is selected to make a fall‑back move , that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to shoot/eligible to declare a charge . Restrictions: Your army can include Blood Angels units, but it cannot include any Adeptus Astartes units drawn from any other Chapter.

enhancements.name: Angelic Executioner
enhancements.restriction: Adeptus Astartes Jump Pack model only.
enhancements.description: When this unit is selected to fight , this unit’s melee attacks have: [Lethal Hits] . Or: [Sustained Hits 1] .

enhancements.name: Shadow of Abomination
enhancements.restriction: Adeptus Astartes Jump Pack model only.
enhancements.description: (Once per battle, per army) When this unit is selected to fight you can use this ability. If you do, this model’s melee attacks have +1 D .

stratagems.name: Judgement of the Golden Host
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, when a friendly Sanguinary Guard unit from your army ends a charge move .
stratagems.target: That Sanguinary Guard unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. Roll one D6 for each model in your unit engaged with that enemy unit:

stratagems.name: Blinding Blurs of Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Sanguinary Guard unit.
stratagems.target: That Sanguinary Guard unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has Stealth .

stratagems.name: Inexorable Valour
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit that was engaged with a friendly Sanguinary Guard unit ends a fall‑back move , if that Sanguinary Guard unit is unengaged .
stratagems.target: That Sanguinary Guard unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

detachment_rule.name: Close-range Eradication
detachment_rule.description: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: Adamantine Mantle
enhancements.description: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made with a Melta or Torrent weapon, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

enhancements.name: Champion of Humanity
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit can ignore any or all modifiers to their characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for them (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

enhancements.name: Forged in Battle
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, once per turn, after making a Hit roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

enhancements.name: War-tempered Artifice
enhancements.description: Add 3 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Crucible of Battle
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target within 6", add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Rapid Embarkation
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has no models embarked within it, and one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT .
stratagems.effect: Your Infantry unit can embark within that TRANSPORT .

stratagems.name: Immolation Protocols
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

stratagems.name: Onslaught of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 12", add 1 to the Hit roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Burning Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: One unit embarked within that TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

detachment_rule.name: Skystrike
detachment_rule.description: Friendly Land Speeder/Storm Speeder Hailstrike/Storm Speeder Hammerstrike/Storm Speeder Thunderstrike units have Speeder . In your first Movement phase, friendly Speeder units can make an ingress move .

enhancements.name: Bellicose Weapon Spirits (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: This unit can re-roll: Damage rolls . Rolls to determine the A of a weapon.

enhancements.name: Raptorial Cogitator Core (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: This unit’s ranged attacks have [Ignores Cover] .

stratagems.name: Reactive Evasion
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Speeder unit.
stratagems.target: That Speeder unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

stratagems.name: Anti-grav Surge
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly unengaged Speeder unit.
stratagems.effect: Place your unit in strategic reserves .

stratagems.name: Data-link Augury
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Speeder unit is selected to shoot .
stratagems.target: That Speeder unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 24" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range until your unit has shot.

detachment_rule.name: Combat Doctrines
detachment_rule.description: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army. You can only select each Combat Doctrine once per battle. DEVASTATOR DOCTRINE This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. TACTICAL DOCTRINE This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. ASSAULT DOCTRINE This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Adept of the Codex
enhancements.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, instead of selecting a Combat Doctrine to be active for your army, you can select the Tactical Doctrine. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for the bearer’s unit only, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine to be active for your army this battle.

enhancements.name: Artificer Armour
enhancements.description: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Fire Discipline
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, while the bearer’s unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: The Honour Vehement
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Only in Death Does Duty End
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Honour the Chapter
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Adaptive Strategy
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for that unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine this battle.

stratagems.name: Storm of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Squad Tactics
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 8" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine.

detachment_rule.name: Keywords
detachment_rule.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE units from your army (excluding FORTIFICATIONS , DROP PODS , WALKERS and units that can FLY ) have the TANK ACE keyword. In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to three TANK ACE units from your army to gain the CHARACTER keyword. Designer’s Note: This means that the selected units can be given Enhancements, and one of them can be selected as your WARLORD .

enhancements.name: Astartes Tank Ace (Aura)
enhancements.description: In your Shooting phase, while a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability

enhancements.name: Firestorm Coordinators
enhancements.description: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Gunnery Honours
enhancements.description: Once per phase, you can re‑roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll for the bearer.

enhancements.name: Redoubtable Machine Spirit
enhancements.description: The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save and, at the end of your Command phase, the bearer regains 1 lost wound.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Target Weak Point
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Kill Shot
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Rapid Gunnery
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Reactive Repositioning
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that is within 8" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6.

stratagems.name: Machine Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is visible and an eligible target.

detachment_rule.name: Armoured Wrath
detachment_rule.description: Once per phase for each ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit in your army, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit.

enhancements.name: Adept of the Omnissiah
enhancements.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Master of Machine War
enhancements.description: In your Command phase, select one ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that VEHICLE is eligible to shoot even if it Fell Back or Advanced this turn.

enhancements.name: Target Augury Web
enhancements.description: In your Command phase, select one ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, weapons equipped by that VEHICLE model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: The Flesh Is Weak
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: Unbowed Conviction
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Mercy Is Weakness
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and when making such an attack, if the attacking model is a VEHICLE , a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Vengeful Animus
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

stratagems.name: Ancient Fury
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, improve your model’s Move, Toughness, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics by 1 and each time your model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Power of the Machine Spirit
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army that was reduced to Below Half-strength as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

detachment_rule.name: Legacy Of The Angel
detachment_rule.description: Friendly Blood Angels Infantry Character units (excluding Commander Dante units) have +1 to advance rolls and charge rolls . This detachment has the GRACE tag and cannot be taken with another GRACE detachment . Restrictions: Your army can include Blood Angels units, but it cannot include any Adeptus Astartes units drawn from any other Chapter.

enhancements.name: Aureole of the Angel
enhancements.description: This unit has ‑3" detection range .

enhancements.name: Blood Boil
enhancements.description: This model’s [Psychic] attacks: Have [ Anti: non‑[Monster/Vehicle 5+]](#kw). Can re‑roll damage rolls .

stratagems.name: Aura of the Angel’s Grace
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Adeptus Astartes Character unit.
stratagems.target: That Character unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has 5+ InSv .

stratagems.name: Soul‑darkened Fury
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit is selected to make a fall‑back move , if that unit is engaged with a friendly Adeptus Astartes Character unit.
stratagems.target: That Adeptus Astartes Character unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a fall‑back move , that enemy unit must use the desperate escape mode, with ‑1 to those hazard rolls if that enemy unit is battle‑shocked .

stratagems.name: Martial Paragon
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Adeptus Astartes Character unit is selected to attack .
stratagems.target: That Adeptus Astartes Character unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s attacks have:

detachment_rule.name: Detachment Restriction
detachment_rule.description: Your army can include BLOOD ANGELS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

enhancements.name: Gift of Foresight
enhancements.description: Once per battle round, just after making a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw for the bearer, you can treat the result as an unmodified roll of 6 instead.

enhancements.name: Icon of the Angel
enhancements.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle‐shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle‐shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

enhancements.name: Rage-fuelled Warrior
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer’s melee weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 3] ability.

enhancements.name: Speed of the Primarch
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.

stratagems.name: Angelic Grace
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army has a mortal wound allocated to it.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Savage Echoes
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was just charged by an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Select either the Strength or Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the selected characteristic. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battle‐shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it) and until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Red Rampage
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LANCE] or [LETHAL HITS] abilities. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, then it becomes Battle‐shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it) and until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities.

stratagems.name: Aggressive Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army has Advanced.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to either shoot or declare a charge, even though it Advanced. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battle‐shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it) and until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to both shoot and declare a charge, even though it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Relentless Assault
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to either shoot or declare a charge even though it Fell Back. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battle‐shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it) and until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to both shoot and declare a charge, even though it Fell Back.

detachment_rule.name: Psychic Disciplines
detachment_rule.description: At the start of the battle round, select one of the following Psychic Disciplines abilities. Friendly Adeptus Astartes Psyker units have that ability until the end of the battle round. Biomancy Discipline: This unit has +2" M . Divination Discipline: This unit’s attacks can: Re‑roll hit rolls of 1. Re‑roll wound rolls of 1. Pyromancy Discipline: This unit’s ranged attacks that target an enemy unit within 12" of this unit have +1 AP . Telekinesis Discipline: Ranged attacks that target this unit have ‑1 S . Telepathy Discipline: This unit’s attacks can ignore modifiers to BS , WS and hit rolls .

enhancements.name: Celerity
enhancements.description: When this unit is selected to make an advance move , that move does not prevent this unit from being eligible to declare a charge . When this unit is selected to make a fall‑back move , if this unit has the Biomancy Discipline ability, that move does not prevent this unit from being eligible to declare a charge .

enhancements.name: Fusillade
enhancements.description: This unit’s ranged attacks have: [Anti‑Monster/Vehicle 5+] . If this unit has the Pyromancy Discipline ability, [Sustained Hits 1] .

enhancements.name: Obfuscation
enhancements.description: Enemy units cannot target this unit with snap shooting attacks. If this unit has the Telepathy Discipline ability, this unit has ‑3" detection range .

enhancements.name: Prescience
enhancements.description: Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only (excluding Terminator models). (Once per turn per unit) In your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is unengaged , this unit can make a normal move of: Up to D6". Or: If this unit has the Divination Discipline ability, up to 6".

enhancements.name: Temporal Corridor
enhancements.description: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, you can place this unit into strategic reserves . If this unit has the Telekinesis Discipline ability, this unit has Deep Strike .

detachment_rule.name: Rapid-drop Deployment
detachment_rule.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select a number of ADEPTUS ASTARTES units (excluding TITANIC units) from your army based on the battle size, as shown below. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability. In an Incursion sized battle, you can select up to 2 units. In a Strike Force sized battle, you can select up to 3 units. In an Onslaught sized battle, you can select up to 4 units. Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack, if it was set up on the battlefield this turn, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If it disembarked from a DROP POD this turn, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 as well.

enhancements.name: Dedicated Gunship
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Laurels of Thunder
enhancements.description: You can re‑roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit in a turn in which it was set up on the battlefield.

enhancements.name: Orbital Uplink Reliquary
enhancements.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Veteran of the Vanguard
enhancements.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

stratagems.name: Suppression Strafing
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to and within 18" of your unit. That enemy unit takes a Battle‑shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Tactical Decapitation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Shock Onslaught
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Auto-sense Coordination
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have this ability in a turn in which they disembarked from a DROP POD or while targeting an enemy unit within 12".

stratagems.name: Blind Screen
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES SMOKE VEHICLE or DROP POD unit within 9" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your units have the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets one of your units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

stratagems.name: Onward for The Emperor
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was not set up on the battlefield this turn and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT , it can embark within it.

detachment_rule.name: Restrictions
detachment_rule.description: Your army can include BLOOD ANGELS units, but it cannot include ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

enhancements.name: Angel’s Fang
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a CHARACTER , MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability.

enhancements.name: Carmine Reliquary
enhancements.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability. Each time you take a Battle-shock test for an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit within 6" of the bearer, you can re-roll the result.

enhancements.name: Master of the Red Thirst
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Sanguinary Tear (Aura)
enhancements.description: While a friendly DEATH COMPANY unit is within 6" of the bearer, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.

stratagems.name: A Grim Warning
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One BLOOD ANGELS unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Insensate Rampage
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Limb from Limb
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn.
stratagems.effect: Select either the Strength or Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the selected characteristic. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battle‑shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it), and until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Deathless Duty
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Red Wrath
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to either shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battle-shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it), and until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

detachment_rule.name: Lightning Assault
detachment_rule.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Feinting Withdrawal
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Fury of the Storm
enhancements.description: Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Hunter’s Instincts
enhancements.description: If the bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Portents of Wisdom
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Blitzing Fusillade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, until the end of the phase, that weapon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability as well.

stratagems.name: Full Throttle
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit (excluding WALKERS ) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is Mounted.

stratagems.name: Shock Assault
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for your unit and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Ride Hard, Ride Fast
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Wind-swift Evasion
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

detachment_rule.name: Nowhere to Hide
detachment_rule.description: Friendly Phobos/Scout Squad units have the following ability: Transhuman Perception: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is detected : While a unit is detected , that unit has +3" detection range .

enhancements.name: Death in the Dark (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: This unit’s attacks that target a hidden unit have +1 to hit rolls .

enhancements.name: Shroud Field
enhancements.description: This model has: Lone Operative . Stealth .

stratagems.name: Strike from the Shadows
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Phobos/Scout Squad unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That Phobos / Scout Squad unit.
stratagems.effect: Those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden .

stratagems.name: Cloaked Position
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly unengaged Phobos / Scout Squad unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has -3" detection range until the end of the turn.

stratagems.name: Adaptive Operations
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Phobos/Scout Squad unit starts an action .
stratagems.target: That Phobos / Scout Squad unit.
stratagems.effect: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot .

detachment_rule.name: Detachment Restrictions
detachment_rule.description: Your army can include BLOOD ANGELS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

enhancements.name: Archangel’s Shard
enhancements.restriction: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only.
enhancements.description: The bearer’s melee weapons have the [ANTI-CHAOS 5+] and [LANCE] abilities.

enhancements.name: Artisan of War
enhancements.restriction: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only.
enhancements.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1, and the bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+.

enhancements.name: Gleaming Pinions
enhancements.restriction: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only.
enhancements.description: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6”.

enhancements.name: Visage of Death
enhancements.restriction: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only.
enhancements.description: In the Battle‐shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, each enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‐shock test.

stratagems.name: Unbridled Ardour
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re‐roll the Hit roll and you can re‐roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Angel’s Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects its targets, it must select your unit as the target of all of its attacks.

stratagems.name: Martial Examplars
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

stratagems.name: Descent of Angels
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

stratagems.name: Death From The Skies
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army Advances or Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

detachment_rule.name: Keywords
detachment_rule.description: If you select this Detachment, DEATH COMPANY MARINES and DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH BOLT RIFLES units from your army have the BATTLELINE keyword

enhancements.name: Blood Shard
enhancements.description: The first time the bearer is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Sanguinius’ Grace
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of three or more enemy models, the bearer can fight one additional time.

enhancements.name: To Slay The Warmaster
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy CHARACTER units, you can select one of those CHARACTER units and roll six D6: for each 4+, one CHARACTER model in that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

enhancements.name: Vengeful Onslaught
enhancements.description: If the bearer is destroyed, until the end of your next turn, each time a friendly DEATH COMPANY model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Glorious Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Final Retribution
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models; on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Furious Onslaught
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army, just before that unit Piles‐in.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‐in move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3". If your unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, or if it is below Starting Strength, it can move up to 6" instead. In either case, it can only do so provided your unit ends that Pile‐in move in Unit Coherency and within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Lost to Rage
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that is below Starting Strength and has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks, Stength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 and, unless your unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, until the end of the phase, those weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

stratagems.name: Wrathful Rampage
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a DEATH COMPANY unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That DEATH COMPANY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, or it is below its Starting Strength, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

detachment_rule.name: Shadow Masters
detachment_rule.description: Each time a ranged attack targets an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Execute and Redeploy
enhancements.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge. This cannot allow the bearer’s unit to move more than once in your Shooting phase.

enhancements.name: Ghostweave Cloak
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

enhancements.name: Shadow War Veteran
enhancements.description: The bearer has the following ability: Lord of Deceit (Aura): Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12” of this model with a stratagem , you can use this ability. If you do increase the CP cost of that use of that stratagem by 1CP.

enhancements.name: The Blade Driven Deep
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

stratagems.name: A Deadly Prize
stratagems.when: Start of the Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
